brand.description_en: Koenigsegg Automotive AB is a Swedish high-performance sports car manufacturer based in Ängelholm, founded by Christian von Koenigsegg in 1994. Known for pushing top speed records and pioneering radical technologies including freevalve engines, carbon fiber wheels, and megacar performance.
brand.description_zh: 柯尼塞格是一家瑞典高性能跑车制造商，总部位于恩厄尔霍尔姆，由克里斯蒂安·冯·柯尼塞格于1994年创立。以不断刷新极速记录和开创革命性技术著称，包括无凸轮轴发动机、碳纤维车轮和超级跑车级性能。

series.description_en: The founding CC series established Koenigsegg as a credible supercar maker. The CCR briefly held the world's fastest production car record in 2005. Built on a carbon fiber chassis with a supercharged Ford V8.
series.description_zh: 创始CC系列确立了柯尼塞格作为可信超跑制造商的地位。CCR于2005年短暂保持世界最快量产车纪录。基于碳纤维底盘搭载机械增压福特V8发动机。

variants.description_en: Koenigsegg's first production car. 655 hp from a supercharged 4.7L Ford V8, carbon fiber monocoque, and a dry weight of just 1,180 kg. Only 6 were built. Established the brand's formula: maximum power-to-weight ratio.
variants.description_zh: 柯尼塞格的首款量产车。机械增压4.7L福特V8输出655马力，碳纤维单体壳，干重仅1,180公斤。仅生产6台。确立了品牌公式：最大功重比。

variants.description_en: The CCR pushed power to 806 hp and briefly held the Guinness World Record for fastest production car at 387.87 km/h in 2005, beating the McLaren F1's long-standing record. Only 14 built.
variants.description_zh: CCR将功率提升至806马力，2005年以387.87 km/h短暂保持最快量产车吉尼斯世界纪录，打破了迈凯伦F1的长期纪录。仅生产14台。

variants.description_en: The CCX was designed to meet US road regulations while maintaining performance. Featured a new twin-supercharged engine running on E85 bioethanol (CCXR variant: 1,018 hp). Made famous by Jeremy Clarkson's near-crash on Top Gear.
variants.description_zh: CCX专为满足美国道路法规而设计，同时保持性能。采用新型双机械增压发动机，可使用E85生物乙醇（CCXR版：1,018马力）。因杰里米·克拉克森在Top Gear的险些事故而广为人知。

series.description_en: Swedish for 'to act', the Agera introduced Koenigsegg's own twin-turbo V8 engine, replacing the Ford-derived unit. The Agera RS set five Guinness World Records including a 277.9 mph (447.2 km/h) average speed in 2017.
series.description_zh: 瑞典语意为'行动'，Agera引入了柯尼塞格自主研发的双涡轮增压V8发动机，取代了福特衍生版本。Agera RS于2017年创下五项吉尼斯世界纪录，包括平均时速277.9英里（447.2 km/h）。

variants.description_en: The original Agera introduced Koenigsegg's own 5.0L twin-turbo V8 making 910 hp. Featuring a hollow carbon fiber one-piece monocoque, Triplex rear suspension, and the world's first production car with carbon fiber wheels.
variants.description_zh: 初代Agera引入了柯尼塞格自主研发的5.0L双涡轮V8，输出910马力。配备空心碳纤维一体式单体壳、三倍联动后悬架，以及世界首款配备碳纤维车轮的量产车。

variants.description_en: The Agera R increased power to 1,140 hp on E85 biofuel. Set multiple world records including 0-300-0 km/h in 21.19 seconds. The R specification could accelerate from 0-400 km/h and back to 0 in under 30 seconds.
variants.description_zh: Agera R在E85生物燃料下功率提升至1,140马力。创下多项世界纪录，包括0-300-0 km/h仅21.19秒。R规格车型可在30秒内完成0-400 km/h再制动至停止。

variants.description_en: The Agera RS set a two-way average speed record of 447.19 km/h on a closed Nevada highway in 2017, beating the Bugatti Chiron's attempt. Total of 5 Guinness World Records. Only 25 built. Features active aerodynamics and the most advanced version of the twin-turbo V8.
variants.description_zh: Agera RS于2017年在封闭的内华达公路上创下447.19 km/h的双向平均速度纪录，超越了布加迪奇龙的尝试。共创下5项吉尼斯世界纪录。仅生产25台。配备主动空气动力学系统和双涡轮V8的最先进版本。

variants.description_en: The world's first 'megacar' — named for its 1:1 power-to-weight ratio (1,360 hp / 1,360 kg). Twin-turbo 5.0L V8 producing 1 megawatt of power. Set a 0-300-0 km/h record of 17.95 seconds. Only 6 production units plus 1 prototype. First production car with over 1 megawatt.
variants.description_zh: 世界首台'百万瓦超跑'——以其1:1的功重比命名（1,360马力/1,360公斤）。双涡轮5.0L V8输出1兆瓦功率。创下0-300-0 km/h仅17.95秒的纪录。仅6台量产版加1台原型车。首款功率超过1兆瓦的量产车。

series.description_en: Named after Christian von Koenigsegg's father Jesko von Koenigsegg, this hypercar represents the pinnacle of Koenigsegg's engineering. Available in two forms: Jesko (1,600 hp) and Jesko Absolut (1,600 hp but theoretically capable of 330 mph).
series.description_zh: 以克里斯蒂安·冯·柯尼塞格的父亲杰斯科·冯·柯尼塞格命名，这款超级跑车代表了柯尼塞格工程技术的巅峰。分为两款：杰斯科（1,600马力）和杰斯科绝对版（1,600马力，理论上可达330英里/小时）。

variants.description_en: The track-focused Jesko produces 1,600 hp on E85 (1,280 hp on petrol). Features a revolutionary 9-speed Light Speed Transmission (LST) with virtually instant gear changes, active aerodynamics generating 800 kg downforce, and a new 5.0L twin-turbo V8.
variants.description_zh: 赛道取向的杰斯科在E85燃料下输出1,600马力（汽油下1,280马力）。配备革命性9速光速变速箱（LST），换挡几乎即时，主动空气动力学产生800公斤下压力，以及全新5.0L双涡轮V8。

variants.description_en: The Jesko Absolut is designed purely for maximum top speed, with a claimed 531 km/h (330 mph). Compared to the regular Jesko, it features reduced aerodynamic drag rather than maximum downforce — a completely different aerodynamic philosophy focused on penetrating air resistance.
variants.description_zh: 杰斯科绝对版专为极限极速设计，官方宣称531 km/h（330英里/小时）。与标准杰斯科相比，采用降低空气阻力而非最大下压力的设计——完全不同的空气动力学哲学，专注于穿透空气阻力。

series.description_en: Swedish for 'to reign', the Regera is Koenigsegg's hybrid hypercar combining a twin-turbo V8 with three electric motors for a combined 1,500 hp. Features Koenigsegg Direct Drive — no traditional gearbox, just a single-speed electric drive system.
series.description_zh: 瑞典语意为'统治'，雷杰拉是柯尼塞格的混合动力超级跑车，将双涡轮V8与三台电动机结合，综合输出1,500马力。配备柯尼塞格直驱系统——没有传统变速箱，仅有单速电驱系统。

variants.description_en: The Regera combines a 1,100 hp twin-turbo V8 with three electric motors for 1,500 hp total and 2,000 Nm of torque. No traditional gearbox — Koenigsegg Direct Drive connects engine directly to wheels via a fluid coupling. Set a 0-400 km/h record of 31.49 seconds.
variants.description_zh: 雷杰拉将1,100马力双涡轮V8与三台电动机结合，综合输出1,500马力和2,000牛·米扭矩。没有传统变速箱——柯尼塞格直驱系统通过液力耦合器将发动机直接连接车轮。创下0-400 km/h仅31.49秒的纪录。

series.description_en: The Gemera is Koenigsegg's first four-seater and the world's first Mega-GT. It combines a 2.0-litre three-cylinder twin-turbo engine (the most powerful three-cylinder ever) with three electric motors for 1,700 hp. Four real seats, luggage space, and hypercar performance.
series.description_zh: Gemera是柯尼塞格首款四座车，也是世界首款Mega-GT。将2.0升三缸双涡轮发动机（有史以来最强三缸机）与三台电动机结合，输出1,700马力。四个真实座椅、行李空间和超跑性能。

variants.description_en: World's first Mega-GT. The Tiny Friendly Giant (TFG) 2.0L three-cylinder produces 600 hp — the most powerful 3-cylinder engine ever built. Three electric motors add 1,100 hp for 1,700 hp total and 3,500 Nm. Four seats, two doors with Koenigsegg's Autosilla system. 300 planned.
variants.description_zh: 世界首款Mega-GT。名为'小友好巨人'（TFG）的2.0L三缸发动机输出600马力——有史以来最强大的三缸发动机。三台电动机增加1,100马力，综合1,700马力和3,500牛·米。四座两门，配备柯尼塞格Autosilla系统。计划生产300台。

series.description_en: The CC850 celebrates 20 years of Koenigsegg and the 50th birthday of Christian von Koenigsegg. It's a modern reinterpretation of the CC8S with a unique Engage Shift System (ESS) that can function as both a 6-speed manual and a 9-speed automatic.
series.description_zh: CC850庆祝柯尼塞格成立20周年和克里斯蒂安·冯·柯尼塞格50岁生日。它是CC8S的现代重新诠释，配备独特的Engage换挡系统（ESS），可同时作为6速手动和9速自动变速箱使用。

variants.description_en: Celebrates 20 years of Koenigsegg with a retro-inspired design echoing the CC8S. The revolutionary Engage Shift System (ESS) can work as a 6-speed manual with a gated shifter or a 9-speed automatic — switching modes seamlessly. 1,385 hp, targa body. 50 units initially, expanded to 70.
variants.description_zh: 以复古设计致敬CC8S，庆祝柯尼塞格成立20周年。革命性的Engage换挡系统（ESS）可在带挡位槽的6速手动和9速自动之间无缝切换。1,385马力，Targa车身。最初50台，后扩展至70台。
